title: kardome_runner per-case execution results JSON
description: Flat JSON written beside the user output WAV for one kardome_runner case. case_format is the document format id (name + version in one string). BMT reads one metric field via manifest; other fields are for humans and tools.

case_format.description: Format id. Bump the trailing number for incompatible changes; change the name if the document meaning changes completely.

kardome_lib_version.description: Optional. libKardome product version only (same family as VERSION_NUMBER in core-main), e.g. semver "x.y.z". Do not include build date/time; the runner may use a short symbol or the leading token before any date. Runtime normalizes to the first token when ingesting.

calibration_kws.description: Same as s_json_data.calib_kws_enable: if true, headline score is keyword_calib_count; if false, hi_namuh_count. GLEO lines are only meaningful when false (stdout prints GLEO per channel; when true, stdout repeats the calib counter — emit that as keyword_calib_count and set gleo_per_channel to [] or repeat zeros).

hi_namuh_count.description: Hi NAMUH total (normal mode). Use 0 in pure calib runs if not applicable.

keyword_calib_count.description: Calibration keyword total (calib mode). Use 0 when calibration_kws is false.

gleo_per_channel.description: Hi GLEO per output channel (same order as "Hi GLEO counter for channel N"). Empty array is allowed if not applicable.

paths.description: Optional copy of paths the runner already logs at start (helps when you only have this file).
